node.data: BiologicalProcessualEntity ≡ (Process ⊓ ∃hasParticipant.StructuredBiologicalEntity ⊓ ∃isIncludedIn.StructuredBiologicalEntity) Organism ⊑ StructuredBiologicalEntity StructuredBiologicalEntity ⊑ ∃atSomeTime.∃isPartOf.Organism BiologicalFunction ≡ (Function ⊓ ∃inheresIn.StructuredBiologicalEntity) StructuredBiologicalEntity ⊑ ∃isBearerOf.TaxonQuality StructuredBiologicalEntity ⊑ PolyMolecularCompositeEntity

MaterialObject ⊑ ∀atSomeTime.MaterialObject InformationObject ⊑ ∀atSomeTime.InformationObject Disposition ⊑ ∀atSomeTime.Disposition ObjectQuality ⊑ ∀atSomeTime.ObjectQuality Role ⊑ ∀atSomeTime.Role ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∀atSomeTime.ImmaterialObject Function ⊑ ∀atSomeTime.Function

SubAtomicParticle PhysicalVolume CompoundOfCollectiveMaterialEntities PhysicalForce isBearerOf isIncludedIn OneDimensionalPhysicalEntity Thing Condition Particular Wave InformationObject ObjectQuality projectsOnto Life isParticipantIn isLifeOf ProcessQuality PhysicalLength InstantaneousProcess Atom hasPart hasGranularPart ValueRegion inheresIn ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity Quality isReferredToAtTime PhysicalMass MaterialObject PointInTime Compound hasLife CollectiveMaterialEntity Universe Canonicity hasComponentPart TaxonQuality Process includes Function Disposition PolyMolecularCompositeEntity isPartOf TwoDimensionalPhysicalEntity TemporalRegion MonoMolecularEntity CanonicityValueRegion Nothing Role hasParticipant TaxonValueRegion ImmaterialObject

Function ⊑ ∃inheresIn.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) MaterialObject ⊑ ∀hasPart.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject) ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∀hasLife.Life Particular ⊑ (Process ⊔ Quality ⊔ ImmaterialObject ⊔ TemporalRegion ⊔ ValueRegion ⊔ Role ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject ⊔ Function ⊔ Disposition) ValueRegion ⊑ Particular MaterialObject ⊑ ∃hasPart.MaterialObject TwoDimensionalPhysicalEntity ⊑ ImmaterialObject MonoMolecularEntity ⊑ Compound Function ⊑ ∀hasPart.Function Quality ⊑ Particular ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity ⊑ ImmaterialObject TaxonQuality ⊑ ObjectQuality MaterialObject ⊑ ∃hasLife.Life disjoint(Compound, SubAtomicParticle) PolyMolecularCompositeEntity ⊑ Compound Process ⊑ ∃projectsOnto.TemporalRegion Quality ⊑ ∀hasPart.Quality InformationObject ⊑ ∃inheresIn.MaterialObject ∃hasParticipant.⊤ ⊑ Process ImmaterialObject ⊑ Particular InformationObject ⊑ ¬∃isBearerOf.PhysicalMass MonoMolecularEntity ⊑ ∃hasPart.Atom Quality ⊑ ∃inheresIn.(Process ⊔ ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) MaterialObject ⊑ ∀isParticipantIn.Process MaterialObject ⊑ ∃hasPart.SubAtomicParticle Process ⊑ ∀projectsOnto.TemporalRegion Quality ⊑ ∀projectsOnto.ValueRegion disjoint(Role, Process, ValueRegion, Disposition, InformationObject, Quality, ImmaterialObject, TemporalRegion, MaterialObject) Condition ≡ (Process ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ Function ⊔ Disposition) ObjectQuality ⊑ ∀inheresIn.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject ⊔ Function) Quality ⊑ ∀isPartOf.Quality InformationObject ⊑ Particular Process ⊑ ∀hasParticipant.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) MaterialObject ⊑ ∃projectsOnto.ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity InformationObject ⊑ (ObjectQuality ⊔ Role ⊔ InformationObject ⊔ Function ⊔ Disposition) Condition ⊑ Particular PhysicalForce ⊑ ProcessQuality Quality ⊑ ∀isIncludedIn.(Process ⊔ Quality ⊔ ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) ∃isBearerOf.⊤ ⊑ (Process ⊔ ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) Wave ⊑ MaterialObject Role ⊑ ∀isIncludedIn.(Process ⊔ ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) InformationObject ⊑ ∀isIncludedIn.(MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) CompoundOfCollectiveMaterialEntities ≡ (Compound ⊓ ∀hasComponentPart.CollectiveMaterialEntity) Process ⊑ ∀hasPart.Process Function ⊑ ∀isPartOf.Function ValueRegion ⊑ ∀includes.Quality ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∀isBearerOf.(ObjectQuality ⊔ Role ⊔ Function ⊔ Disposition) CompoundOfCollectiveMaterialEntities ⊑ Compound PhysicalMass ⊑ ObjectQuality CollectiveMaterialEntity ⊑ ∃hasGranularPart.MaterialObject disjoint(CanonicityValueRegion, TaxonValueRegion) Particular ⊑ ∃isReferredToAtTime.TemporalRegion (PolyMolecularCompositeEntity ⊓ ∃isPartOf.(Atom ⊔ SubAtomicParticle ⊔ MonoMolecularEntity)) ⊑ ⊥ MaterialObject ⊑ ∀hasGranularPart.MaterialObject MaterialObject ⊑ Particular ProcessQuality ⊑ ∀inheresIn.Process TemporalRegion ⊑ ∀hasPart.TemporalRegion ∃inheresIn.⊤ ⊑ (Quality ⊔ Role ⊔ InformationObject ⊔ Function ⊔ Disposition) InformationObject ⊑ ∀isParticipantIn.Process Process ⊑ ∀isBearerOf.ProcessQuality Process ⊑ ∀isPartOf.Process Function ⊑ Particular ∃isParticipantIn.Process ⊑ (ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∃isPartOf.Universe MaterialObject ⊑ ∃isBearerOf.PhysicalVolume PointInTime ⊑ TemporalRegion PhysicalVolume ⊑ ObjectQuality ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity ⊑ ∀projectsOnto.ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity Disposition ⊑ ∃inheresIn.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) ImmaterialObject ⊑ ¬∃isBearerOf.PhysicalMass ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∀isParticipantIn.Process InformationObject ⊑ ∀hasLife.Life Life ⊑ ∃isLifeOf.Particular PhysicalMass ⊑ ∀inheresIn.MaterialObject Role ⊑ ∀isPartOf.Role ObjectQuality ⊑ Quality Process ⊑ Particular Life ⊑ Process ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∃isBearerOf.PhysicalVolume disjoint(Role, Process, ValueRegion, Function, InformationObject, Quality, ImmaterialObject, TemporalRegion, MaterialObject) Canonicity ⊑ ∀projectsOnto.CanonicityValueRegion Canonicity ⊑ ∀isIncludedIn.(Process ⊔ ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ Function) ProcessQuality ⊑ ∃inheresIn.Process Life ⊑ ∀isLifeOf.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∃hasLife.Life Compound ⊑ MaterialObject Particular ⊑ ∀isReferredToAtTime.TemporalRegion disjoint(PhysicalVolume, Canonicity, PhysicalForce, PhysicalLength, TaxonQuality, PhysicalMass) Disposition ⊑ ∀hasPart.Disposition disjoint(MonoMolecularEntity, Atom, PolyMolecularCompositeEntity) MaterialObject ⊑ ∀projectsOnto.ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity TemporalRegion ⊑ ∀isPartOf.TemporalRegion Role ⊑ ∀hasPart.Role TemporalRegion ⊑ Particular TaxonQuality ⊑ ∀projectsOnto.TaxonValueRegion SubAtomicParticle ⊑ (∀hasPart.SubAtomicParticle ⊓ MaterialObject) Canonicity ⊑ Quality InformationObject ⊑ ∀hasPart.InformationObject TaxonValueRegion ⊑ ValueRegion MaterialObject ⊑ ∃isBearerOf.PhysicalMass ProcessQuality ⊑ Quality CollectiveMaterialEntity ⊑ MaterialObject Disposition ⊑ ∀isIncludedIn.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) InformationObject ⊑ ∃hasLife.Life ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∀hasPart.ImmaterialObject disjoint(SubAtomicParticle, Universe, Wave) OneDimensionalPhysicalEntity ⊑ ImmaterialObject Compound ⊑ ∃hasPart.SubAtomicParticle Process ⊑ ∀includes.(Process ⊔ ProcessQuality) Disposition ⊑ Particular CanonicityValueRegion ⊑ ValueRegion disjoint(ProcessQuality, ObjectQuality) Role ⊑ ∃inheresIn.(Process ⊔ ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) PhysicalLength ⊑ ObjectQuality MaterialObject ⊑ ∀isBearerOf.(ObjectQuality ⊔ Role ⊔ InformationObject ⊔ Function ⊔ Disposition) disjoint(OneDimensionalPhysicalEntity, Wave, ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity, TwoDimensionalPhysicalEntity) Atom ⊑ Compound InformationObject ⊑ ¬∃isBearerOf.PhysicalVolume Role ⊑ Particular ImmaterialObject ⊑ ∀isPartOf.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject) InformationObject ⊑ ∀isPartOf.InformationObject disjoint(Atom, InformationObject) ObjectQuality ⊑ (Quality ⊓ ∃inheresIn.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject)) Universe ⊑ PolyMolecularCompositeEntity InstantaneousProcess ≡ (Process ⊓ ∀projectsOnto.PointInTime) Function ⊑ ∀isIncludedIn.(ImmaterialObject ⊔ MaterialObject ⊔ InformationObject) Quality ⊑ ∃projectsOnto.ValueRegion MaterialObject ⊑ ∀hasLife.Life Disposition ⊑ ∀isPartOf.Disposition

OrganismPart ≡ (∃hasProperPhysicalPart.Tissue ⊓ ∃originatesFrom.MulticellularOrganism) TissueProcess ≡ (∃hasParticipant.Tissue ⊓ BiologicalProcessualEntity) Tissue ⊑ ∃hasLocus.OrganismPart Tissue ⊑ ∃hasComponentPart.∃hasGranularPart.Cell OrganismPart ⊑ StructuredBiologicalEntity Tissue ⊑ PortionOfHeterogenousSolid Tissue ⊑ ∃hasComponentPart.∃hasGranularPart.EntireMolecularEntity Tissue ⊑ ∃originatesFrom.MulticellularOrganism

StateOfMatterValueRegion ⊑ ValueRegion StateOfMatterValueRegion ⊑ ∃isProjectionOf.StateOfMatter StateOfMatter ⊑ ∃projectsOnto.StateOfMatterValueRegion StateOfMatter ⊑ ∀projectsOnto.StateOfMatterValueRegion StateOfMatter ⊑ ObjectQuality

CanonicityValueRegion ⊑ ∀isProjectionOf.Canonicity ValueRegion ⊑ ∀isProjectionOf.Quality ∃isProjectionOf.⊤ ⊑ (ImmaterialObject ⊔ TemporalRegion ⊔ ValueRegion) TaxonValueRegion ⊑ ∀isProjectionOf.TaxonQuality ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity ⊑ ∀isProjectionOf.(ImmaterialThreeDimensionalPhysicalEntity ⊔ MaterialObject) TemporalRegion ⊑ ∀isProjectionOf.(Process ⊔ TemporalRegion)
PathologicalStructure PathologicalDisposition PathologicalCondition PathologicalProcess NoncanonicalProcessualEntity NoncanonicalValueRegion

PathologicalDisposition ≡ (∃inheresIn.∃isBearerOf.(Canonicity ⊓ ∃projectsOnto.NoncanonicalValueRegion) ⊓ Disposition) NoncanonicalProcessualEntity ≡ (Process ⊓ ∃isBearerOf.(Canonicity ⊓ ∃projectsOnto.NoncanonicalValueRegion)) PathologicalStructure ≡ (StructuredBiologicalEntity ⊓ ∃isBearerOf.(Canonicity ⊓ ∃projectsOnto.NoncanonicalValueRegion)) NoncanonicalValueRegion ⊑ CanonicityValueRegion PathologicalCondition ⊑ Condition PathologicalProcess ≡ (BiologicalProcessualEntity ⊓ ∃isBearerOf.(Canonicity ⊓ ∃projectsOnto.NoncanonicalValueRegion)) PathologicalCondition ≡ (PathologicalDisposition ⊔ PathologicalProcess ⊔ PathologicalStructure)
BiologicalLife ⊑ OrganismProcess LivingOrganism ⊑ Organism OrganismProcess ≡ (BiologicalProcessualEntity ⊓ ∃hasParticipant.LivingOrganism) LivingOrganism ⊑ ∃isParticipantIn.BiologicalLife
